community.zabbix.zabbix_action.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix actions.

community.zabbix.zabbix_api_info.description: This module allows you to retrieve Zabbix api info.

community.zabbix.zabbix_authentication.description: This module allows you to modify Zabbix authentication setting.

community.zabbix.zabbix_autoregister.description: This module allows you to modify Zabbix autoregistration.

community.zabbix.zabbix_configuration.description: This module allows you to import Zabbix configuration data. If the Zabix configuration.importcompare API returns non-empty list, this module returns changed is true.

community.zabbix.zabbix_connector.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix connectors.

community.zabbix.zabbix_correlation.description: This module allows you to create, update and delete Zabbix correlation.

community.zabbix.zabbix_discovery_rule.description: Create discovery rule. Delete existing discovery rule. Update existing discovery rule with new options.

community.zabbix.zabbix_discoveryrule.description: Create discoveryrules if they do not exist. Delete existing discoveryrules if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_globalmacro.description: manages Zabbix Global macros, it can create, update or delete them. For macro_type Secret the value field cannot be validated and will always be overwritten due to the secret nature of the Text.

community.zabbix.zabbix_group.description: Create host groups if they do not exist. Delete existing host groups if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_group_events_inf.short_description: Get all triggers about a Zabbix group
community.zabbix.zabbix_group_events_inf.description: This module allows you to check the state of triggers of all hosts in a Zabbix hostgroup.

community.zabbix.zabbix_group_info.description: This module allows you to search for Zabbix hostgroup entries. This module was called C(zabbix_group_facts) before Ansible 2.9. The usage did not change.

community.zabbix.zabbix_host.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix host entries and associated group and template data.

community.zabbix.zabbix_host_events_info.short_description: Get all triggers about a Zabbix host
community.zabbix.zabbix_host_events_info.description: This module allows you to see if a Zabbix host have no active alert to make actions on it. For this case use module Ansible

community.zabbix.zabbix_host_info.description: This module allows you to search for Zabbix host entries. This module was called C(zabbix_host_facts) before Ansible 2.9. The usage did not change.

community.zabbix.zabbix_hostmacro.description: manages Zabbix host macros, it can create, update or delete them.

community.zabbix.zabbix_housekeeping.description: This module allows you to modify Zabbix housekeeping setting.

community.zabbix.zabbix_item.description: Create items if they do not exist. Delete existing items if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_itemprototype.description: Create item prototypes if they do not exist. Delete existing item prototypes if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_maintenance.description: This module will let you create Zabbix maintenance windows.

community.zabbix.zabbix_mediatype.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix media types.

community.zabbix.zabbix_mfa.description: This module allows you to create, update and delete Zabbix MFA method.

community.zabbix.zabbix_proxy.description: This module allows you to create, modify, get and delete Zabbix proxy entries.

community.zabbix.zabbix_proxy_group.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix proxy group.

failover_delay.description: Failover period for each proxy in the group to have online/offline state. Time suffixes are supported, e.g. 30s, 1m.

min_online.description: Minimum number of online proxies required for the group to be online.

community.zabbix.zabbix_proxy_info.description: This module allows you to obtain detailed information about configured zabbix proxies.

community.zabbix.zabbix_regexp.description: This module allows you to create, update and delete Zabbix regular expression.

community.zabbix.zabbix_regexp_info.description: This module allows you to retrieve Zabbix regular expression.

community.zabbix.zabbix_script.description: This module allows you to create, update and delete scripts.

community.zabbix.zabbix_service_info.description: This module allows you to obtain detailed information about configured zabbix service.

community.zabbix.zabbix_settings.description: This module allows you to update Zabbix global settings.

community.zabbix.zabbix_template.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix templates. Multiple templates can be created or modified at once if passing JSON or XML to module.

community.zabbix.zabbix_template_info.description: This module allows you to search for Zabbix template.

community.zabbix.zabbix_templategroup.description: Create template groups if they do not exist. Delete existing template groups if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_token.description: This module allows you to create, update, generate and delete Zabbix token.

community.zabbix.zabbix_trigger.description: Create triggers if they do not exist. Delete existing triggers if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_triggerprototype.description: Create triggerprototypes if they do not exist. Delete existing triggerprototypes if they exist.

community.zabbix.zabbix_user.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix users.

community.zabbix.zabbix_user_info.description: This module allows you to search for Zabbix user entries.

community.zabbix.zabbix_user_role.description: This module adds or removes zabbix roles

community.zabbix.zabbix_usergroup.description: Create user groups if they do not exist. Delete existing user groups if they exist and are empty. Update existing user groups.

community.zabbix.zabbix_valuemap.description: This module allows you to create, modify and delete Zabbix value maps.

community.zabbix.zabbix_valuemap_info.description: This module allows you to search for Zabbix valuemap entries.
